frame_analyses.description: Title card: 'FALOPE RING APPLICATOR or LAPAROCATOR: how to load and how to use' by Dr Pallavi Gupta
Close-up of laparoscopic applicator being held in hand; shows black handle with white metal shaft
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstration of proper applicator grip and orientation

frame_analyses.description: Applicator shown with mechanical ring mechanism visible; metal band visible around shaft
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstration of ligating ring assembly and trigger mechanism

frame_analyses.description: Hand positioning the applicator; showing how to load the ligating ring onto the shaft
Closeup of foam appendage with white gauze material draped over it
Applicator being positioned over foam appendage; ring is being guided to the marked site on the appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper technique for loop positioning on target appendage

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay slide: 'When you have loaded both rings together: first select 1 and apply the ring and then select 2 to apply the second ring'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Verbal/textual instruction on ring application sequence

frame_analyses.description: Applicator being advanced toward foam appendage; demonstrating pusher advancement technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand positioning and advancement mechanics shown

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage base; cinching motion being demonstrated with grasper/applicator interaction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstration of tightening and securing the loop at the mark

frame_analyses.description: Scissors cutting the tail of the ligating loop material after cinching; demonstrating proper cutting location inside field
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final cutting step shown cleanly with appropriate instrument control

frame_analyses.description: Completed loop securing the foam appendage at the marked site; appendage remains intact and loop is cinched tightly
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result showing complete task with secure loop placement and adequate tissue control

frame_analyses.description: Gloved hand displaying the completed result; loop securely cinched on foam appendage with tail already cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion confirmed; loop placement appears at or very near the marked site

video_classification_justification: This is clearly an instructional/educational video. It contains: (1) title slide identifying it as an educational tutorial, (2) no timing measurement or performance attempt, (3) narration by name ('Dr Pallavi Gupta'), (4) text overlays with verbal instructions, (5) demonstration-only content showing equipment and proper technique. This is NOT a trainee performance being scored for FLS certification. This is an expert teaching video.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper grip and control of ligating loop applicator/laparocator
Loading of ligating ring onto applicator shaft
Positioning of applicator to orient loop around target appendage
Advancement of pusher to cinch and secure loop at marked site on appendage base
Cutting of loop tail inside the trainer field using scissors
Sequential application of dual rings (select ring 1, apply; select ring 2, apply)
Maintenance of tissue control throughout cinching and cutting phases
verbal_cues: Title instruction: 'FALOPE RING APPLICATOR or LAPAROCATOR: how to load and how to use'
Instructional overlay: 'When you have loaded both rings together: first select 1 and apply the ring and then select 2 to apply the second ring'
Implicit instruction shown through demonstration of sequential hand motions and applicator positioning
common_errors_addressed: Proper sequencing of ring application (not applying both simultaneously)
Correct positioning of loop at the marked site on the appendage base
Ensuring loop is fully cinched before cutting the tail
Cutting the tail completely inside the trainer (not leaving excess material outside)
teaching_content.additional_teaching_notes: Dr. Pallavi Gupta demonstrates smooth, efficient technique with no hesitations or false movements. Equipment handling is confident and methodical. The demonstration clearly shows all phases of the task and emphasizes proper sequencing and placement, which are critical for passing FLS certification.

confidence_rationale: This is unambiguously an instructional/educational video. No performance attempt occurs; no timing measurement is applicable. The entire video is teaching content with clear educational intent.
cannot_determine: Actual task performance metrics (completion time, penalties) — this is not a performance video
Individual trainee skill level — this is an expert demonstration/tutorial
summary: This video is Dr. Pallavi Gupta's instructional tutorial on how to load and use the Falope Ring Applicator/Laparocator for endoloop ligation. It systematically demonstrates proper technique for all phases: equipment loading, target positioning, loop advancement, cinching, and tail cutting. The video emphasizes correct sequencing and placement on the marked site. No FLS task score is applicable; the video serves purely as educational content for training purposes. Teaching quality is high — technique is expert-level, demonstrations are clear, and instructional overlays reinforce key concepts.
